title: Staff Software Engineer - AI SDK
description:
Temporal Technologies seeks a Staff Software Engineer to develop AI SDK features. The company provides durable execution infrastructure used by organizations like OpenAI, Lovable, and Replit.

Primary Responsibilities:
- Design and implement AI SDK features across multiple frameworks and libraries
- Develop expertise in AI application architecture and emerging patterns
- Work primarily with Python and TypeScript codebases
- Leverage AI coding tools to maintain quality across numerous integrations
- Own features end-to-end with focus on reliability and developer experience
- Serve as domain expert on AI design patterns with internal and external teams
- Engage directly with developer community for debugging and feedback
- Create technical documentation for public libraries
- Travel 1-2 times annually for team meetings

Core Requirements:
- 7+ years software engineering experience post-graduation
- Passion for generative AI, particularly agents and coding applications
- Deep understanding of concurrent programming (mutexes, atomics, primitives)
- Fluency in multiple programming languages
- Open source contribution history including third-party libraries
- API design and documentation experience for public modules
- Strong English communication (written and verbal)
- BS/MS in Computer Science or equivalent production software experience
- Experience with distributed systems
- Concurrent code writing expertise

Nice-to-Have Qualifications:
- Familiarity with Temporal's programming model
- Machine learning or ML systems background
- Large-scale distributed systems architecture experience
- Graduate degree in Computer Science

Compensation: $224,000 - $302,400. Benefits include unlimited PTO plus 12 holidays, 100% medical/dental/vision coverage, 401(k), professional development stipend ($1,800/year), and home office reimbursement.
